tldr: Erlend Blikra (Uno-X Mobility) won the 146.8 km Stage 4 bunch sprint to Sohar, outkicking Emmanuel Houcou and Sebastián Molano. The GC was untouched, leaving Schmid in the lead ahead of the Green Mountain showdown.

narrative.headline: Blikra wins the sprint to Sohar
narrative.body: The 146.8 km Stage 4 from Al Sawadi Beach to Sohar was the week's second pure sprint day. Erlend Blikra of Uno-X Mobility timed his effort best, beating Emmanuel Houcou and Stage 1 winner Sebastián Molano in the bunch gallop. With no time gaps among the GC men, the overall standings were frozen going into the decisive final stage.

gcImpact.headline: GC unchanged before Green Mountain
gcImpact.body: The bunch finished together, so the GC was untouched: Schmid still led from Scaroni at +4s and Tjøtta at +9s. Everything would be decided on the Jabal al Akhdhar summit finish on Stage 5.
